Cost-sharing may include copayment, co-insurance, or the greater/lesser of the two. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: POST_OOPT_COSTSHARE_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
1 = Coinsurance 

2 = Copayment 

3 = Greater of Coinsurance and Copayment 

4 = Lesser of Coinsurance and Copayment 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2007. This field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost 
Shares do not apply.
